watchdog_orgs_searched: Democracy for the Arab World Now (DAWN)
notes: All 13 negative/reputational themes and all 9 watchdog/NGO organisations were run this cycle as individual 'Saudi Arabia'-paired searches. No eligible (non-Saudi-owned, non-Israeli) article with a confirmed 2026-07-19 or 2026-07-20 publication date was found. Strongest recent candidates were verified out-of-window (Amnesty domestic-workers report 2026-07-09; CPJ/4-NGO detained-creators call 2026-07-10; CIVICUS sportswashing item March 2026) and are therefore excluded. Empty Negative Articles section is a genuine quiet-window outcome, not a skipped search.
